commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh If his children forsake my law, and walk not in my judgments; And if. God foresaw the prevarications of the Israelites and Christians: But he speaks this to show their free-will, and that he would treat them as children, (Berthier) and not with the utmost severity, (Calmet) unless they proved obstinate, 2 Kings vii. (Haydock) Some shall always continue faithful, and shall be glorified, while the bad shall be cast away. Augustine) Christ will never lose his Church. (Worthington).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
